title: POSTPARTUM SUPPORT INTERNATIONAL HELPLINE - 211info
text: POSTPARTUM SUPPORT INTERNATIONAL POSTPARTUM SUPPORT INTERNATIONAL HELPLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a confidential helpline that offers support and local referrals. Shares online information and support groups focused on the emotional and mental health of childbearing families. The Postpartum Support International website helps users locate specialized support coordinators, crisis hotlines, support groups, and local events by state or county. 6706 SW 54th Avenue Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Pregnant and postpartum individuals, parents, and family members Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 944-4773 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Helpline (800) 944-4773 Call or text Spanish Text Helpline (971) 420-0294 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call, or text helpline. Callers may leave confidential messages anytime and staff will return calls within 48 hours. Messages are returned within one business day. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Internet Support Groups * Perinatal Depression Specialized Information and Referral * Perinatal Depression Talklines/Warmlines * Perinatal Depression If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. POSTPARTUM SUPPORT INTERNATIONAL
